nodes.label: Node 20+ Target
nodes.rationale: Dev machine runs Node 24; code targets Node 20 via engines field.

nodes.label: Docker Not Installed on Build Machine
nodes.rationale: docker-compose.yml is authored and correct, but migrations/seed/live API were not run on the build machine; local run needs Docker Desktop or Postgres 16+pgvector and Redis.

nodes.label: Default LLM Model claude-sonnet-5
nodes.rationale: Uses env LLM_MODEL=claude-sonnet-5 instead of brief's literal claude-sonnet-4-6 (older/incorrect id); fully env-overridable; provider abstraction makes exact id irrelevant to architecture.

nodes.label: Task Model claude-haiku-4-5
nodes.rationale: Cheap extraction (email parsing) via taskModel config split TASK_LLM_PROVIDER / TASK_LLM_MODEL.

nodes.label: Money as Integer USD Cents
nodes.rationale: Stored as *_usd_cents in DB to avoid float drift; LKR is display-only via fixed env FX rate USD_TO_LKR (default 305); MVP has no live FX; PriceDisplay carries both plus rate used.

nodes.label: driver_availability Unavailable Ranges
nodes.rationale: Stores unavailable (blocked) date ranges; a driver is free iff no block overlaps the query range — models real charter calendars better than enumerating free days.

nodes.label: Embeddings vector(1024)
nodes.rationale: Dimension env-configurable via EMBEDDINGS_DIM but schema pins 1024 to match pgvector column; changing requires a migration.

nodes.label: Default EMBEDDINGS_PROVIDER=mock
nodes.rationale: Deterministic hash-based unit vectors, no network, reproducible seeds; Voyage and OpenAI adapters implemented; mock similarity is lexical-ish for offline hybrid search demo.

nodes.label: Design Tokens Single Source of Truth
nodes.rationale: Tokens in packages/shared/src/design/tokens.ts mirrored into apps/web Tailwind config + globals.css; scripts/check-colors.mjs fails CI if non-grayscale hex appears outside globals.css.

nodes.label: Chat UI Visual Shell Deferred
nodes.rationale: Reference chat-UI screenshots pending from user; /chat visual shell deferred; backend agent loop + component contracts proceed first.
